title: Amtech S4135 9 Piece round tip art brush set
features: ROUND TIPS: An assortment of 9 paint brushes with rounded tips, ranging in length from 16-19cm
WOODEN HANDLES: These brushes have traditional wooden handles with the sizes printed on each one
ALL TYPES OF ART PROJECTS: Ideal for all types of arts and crafts projects, including painting canvasses, ceramics and models
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: Product Description Am-tech diy and tool products come with a twelve month and are built for the rigors of the typical english home owner and the diy jobs expected. the range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. am-tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. am-tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from dummy cameras to siren sounding locks. am-tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 9pc Round Tip Art Brush Set See more
